extraction.one_line_summary: CORT Magnus won the TTT stage for EF Education-EasyPost by 1.4 seconds over Jumbo-Visma, taking yellow by attacking solo in final 200 meters under new first-rider-across timing rules.
tactical_patterns: New TTT rules incentivized solo attacks in final 200m: Pogačar attacked teammates, Cort's solo effort gained yellow by 1sec.
Jayco-AlUla 22.7sec fastest at intermediate check but faded, revealing wind-sheltered early course favored front-heavy pacing strategies.
UAE gave Gaudu armchair ride to finish suggesting domestique conservation for GC secondary riders became viable under individual timing rules.

rider_signals.CORT Magnus: positive: executed perfect solo TTT finale attack under new rules, taking yellow by 1sec over Vingegaard despite weaker team
rider_signals.POGAČAR Tadej: neutral: attacked own teammates in finale but UAE team 20sec slower than Jayco suggests TTT weakness compared to rivals
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: positive: Jumbo-Visma's 3-man finish only 1.4sec from stage win shows team strength, Vingegaard now leads Pogačar by handful seconds
rider_signals.GAUDU David: positive: UAE gave him armchair ride suggesting team protecting secondary GC option, positions him well for mountain stages
rider_signals.YATES Simon: neutral: Jayco-AlUla dominated intermediate but lost 4sec to Jumbo by finish, suggesting pacing misjudgment or wind shift
